heading: Preparation of analyses
label: 607 Preparation of analyses
text: In complying with the provisions of sections 603 and 604 of this title, an agency may provide either a quantifiable or numerical description of the effects of a proposed rule or alternatives to the proposed rule, or more general descriptive statements if quantification is not practicable or reliable.
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under .Jan. 1, 1981section 4 of Pub. L. 96–354section 601 of this title
